workloads.text: alternate one text binding in an otherwise stable template
workloads.create: create a fresh detached root with 1,000 keyed rows
workloads.update: alternate all text values across 1,000 keyed rows

methodology.frameworkOrder: rotated for every warm-up and measured sample
methodology.unit: milliseconds per operation; lower is faster
